name: LeBlanc

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Mirror Image
passive.description_source: Innate: When  LeBlanc reaches low health, she creates a  clone of herself and together they enter brief  invisibility.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, when LeBlanc is damaged to 40% maximum health, she creates a clone of herself, after which they both instantly become invisible for 1 second.

The clone can cast basic attacks with no effect and lasts 8 seconds. Upon spawning, it starts moving up to 1900 units toward a random direction in front of LeBlanc's movement, determined at the moment of its spawning.
See Pets for more details about LeBlanc's clone.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, when LeBlanc is damaged to 40% maximum health, she creates a clone of herself, after which they both instantly become invisible for 1 second.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The clone has a leash range.

basic_ability_1.name: Sigil of Malice
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  LeBlanc projects an orb at the target enemy, dealing magic damage and marking them for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: LeBlanc projects an orb at the target enemy that deals magic damage and marks them for 3.5 seconds.
LeBlanc's next damaging ability against the marked target will consume the mark to deal the same magic damage again.

effects.description: Sigil of Malice's orb deals 10 : 146 (based on level) bonus magic damage against minions and refunds 100% of its mana cost and 30% of its remaining cooldown if either the orb or its mark's consumption kills the target.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: LeBlanc projects an orb at the target enemy that deals magic damage and marks them for 3.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Sigil of Malice and Mimic: Sigil of Malice can detonate each other's marks.

basic_ability_2.name: Distortion
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  LeBlanc  dashes to the target location, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies upon arrival. She leaves behind a return pad at her original location that lasts a few seconds, during which she can recast.

effects.context_notes: Active: LeBlanc dashes to the target location, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies upon arrival and leaving a return pad at the cast location for 4 seconds.

effects.description: Recast: LeBlanc blinks to Distortion's return pad, regardless of range.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: LeBlanc dashes to the target location, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies upon arrival and leaving a return pad at the cast location for 4 seconds. Distortion can be recast after 0.2 seconds of the dash ending for the pad's duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Distortion will be buffered and cast as soon as the cooldown ends if the player attempts to cast it within 0.5 seconds.

basic_ability_3.name: Ethereal Chains
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  LeBlanc flings an illusory chain in the target direction that deals magic damage and  tethers the first enemy hit,  revealing them.

effects.context_notes: Active: LeBlanc flings an illusory chain in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy it hits and forms a tether between LeBlanc and the target for 1.5 seconds.
If the tether is not broken by the end of its duration, it fractures to deal magic damage to the target and root them for 1.5 seconds.
If the tether is not broken by the end of its duration, it fractures to deal magic damage to the target and root them for 1.5 seconds.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: LeBlanc flings an illusory chain in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy it hits and forms a tether between LeBlanc and the target for 1.5 seconds, during which they are revealed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Both the initial and the delayed damage can detonate Sigil of Malice.

ultimate.name: Mimic
ultimate.description_source: Active:  LeBlanc casts a mimicked version of her most recent ability, which deals modified damage.

effects.description: Active: LeBlanc casts a mimicked version of her most recently used basic ability, applying the same effects and dealing modified magic damage.

effects.context_notes: Mimic: Sigil of Malice: The orb deals modified damage, while the mark consumption deals double that amount.
Mimic: Sigil of Malice: The orb deals modified damage, while the mark consumption deals double that amount.
Mimic: Sigil of Malice: The orb deals modified damage, while the mark consumption deals double that amount.
Mimic: Ethereal Chains: The tether's application deals modified damage, while its fracturing deals double that amount.
Mimic: Ethereal Chains: The tether's application deals modified damage, while its fracturing deals double that amount.
Mimic: Ethereal Chains: The tether's application deals modified damage, while its fracturing deals double that amount.

ultimate.description: Active: LeBlanc casts a mimicked version of her most recently used basic ability, applying the same effects and dealing modified magic damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Mimic defaults to Mimic: Sigil of Malice if no basic ability was used before rank-up, and copied-spell execution semantics follow the mimicked basic ability branch.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
